headline: Does POOL’s 2025 Earnings And Dividend Shift The Bull Case Toward Maintenance-Driven Stability?
summary: Pool Corporation recently reported past fourth-quarter 2025 results showing sales of US$982.21 million and net income of US$31.59 million, alongside full-year 2025 diluted EPS of US$10.85 and a newly declared quarterly dividend of US$1.25 per share payable on March 26, 2026. These updates highlight a business balancing softer new pool construction with steadier maintenance demand, while continuing to return cash to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases totaling US$2.46...
